exit_code.description: Process exit code when `state == Exited`; absent otherwise.

reason.description: Free-form reason populated when `state == Errored` (adapter name + short description) so the UI can show something more useful than the raw state string. Other states leave this `None`.

oneOf.description: Soft-deleted by the user via `sessions.archive`. The row stays in SQLite (and may be restored) but is hidden from the default list.
